positive.stdout:

5. ? [X0] : (becomes_smarter(X0) & gains_knowledge(X0)) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~? [X0] : (becomes_smarter(X0) & gains_knowledge(X0)) [negated conjecture 5]
8. ! [X0,X1] : (gains_knowledge(X0) | ~reads(X0,X1)) [ennf transformation 2]
9. ! [X0] : (becomes_smarter(X0) | ~gains_knowledge(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
10. ! [X0] : (~becomes_smarter(X0) | ~gains_knowledge(X0)) [ennf transformation 6]
11. ~reads(X0,X1) | gains_knowledge(X0) [cnf transformation 8]
12. becomes_smarter(X0) | ~gains_knowledge(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
13. reads(harry,walden) [cnf transformation 4]
14. ~becomes_smarter(X0) | ~gains_knowledge(X0) [cnf transformation 10]
15. ~gains_knowledge(X0) [forward subsumption resolution 12,14]
16. gains_knowledge(harry) [resolution 11,13]
17. $false [forward subsumption resolution 16,15]
% SZS output end Proof for premise_positive
% Termination reason: Refutation
